_comment: Small synthetic, PII-free golden corpus for the eval harness. The candidate is a fictional backend/data engineer. Scoring cases are JDs labeled with a graded relevance (0 irrelevant, 1 adjacent, 2 strong) RELATIVE TO THIS CANDIDATE. Selection cases pair a requirement set with the 0-based indices of the candidate bullets that should cover each must-have. Labels are hand-set so a correct algorithm (lexical + semantic + selection) ranks and covers well; they double as regression anchors. Vocabulary in the relevant JDs deliberately overlaps the candidate's bullets/skills so the bag-of-words FakeEmbedder and a real bge embedder agree on the ordering.

bullets.text: Built ETL pipelines in Python that processed 30 million rows per day.
Operated Kubernetes clusters across three AWS regions for the data platform.
Designed PostgreSQL schemas and tuned slow analytical queries.
Authored Terraform modules to provision the data warehouse infrastructure.
Orchestrated nightly Airflow DAGs feeding the analytics warehouse.
Mentored two junior engineers on backend service design.
Reduced API latency by 40 percent by adding Redis caching.

job.title: Backend Data Platform Engineer
job.jd_text: We are hiring a backend engineer for our data platform. You will build ETL pipelines in Python, operate Kubernetes clusters on AWS, and design PostgreSQL schemas. Airflow orchestration and Terraform experience are a plus.

job.title: Data Engineer
job.jd_text: Build and operate ETL pipelines in Python feeding a PostgreSQL warehouse. Schedule Airflow DAGs and deploy on Kubernetes. SQL fluency required.

job.title: Platform Engineer
job.jd_text: Operate Kubernetes and write Terraform to manage AWS infrastructure. Some Python scripting. This is an infrastructure-leaning role, less data work.

job.title: Junior PHP Developer
job.jd_text: Maintain a legacy PHP and WordPress storefront. Write some MySQL and jQuery. Front-of-house e-commerce work.

job.title: Frontend Designer
job.jd_text: Design and build delightful React interfaces. Strong Figma, CSS, and visual design skills. No backend work.

job.title: Account Executive
job.jd_text: Drive new business, manage a sales pipeline in Salesforce, and hit quota. Excellent communication and negotiation skills.

job.title: Backend Engineer
job.jd_text: Build Python backend services for our online gambling platform with PostgreSQL and Kubernetes. High-traffic betting systems.

requirements.text: Build and operate ETL data pipelines in Python.
Schedule and orchestrate Airflow data workflows.
